title: astragalus orthanthoides
intro: Astragalus orthanthoides, also known as the "Chinese milk vetch," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the pea family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus orthanthoides include reducing stress and fatigue, boosting the immune system, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus orthanthoides can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
